R1.label: Max Complacency
R1.detail: Low COR1M + steep contango — buy the umbrella while sunny

R2.label: Early Warning
R2.detail: Low COR1M + front flattening/inverting — watch closely

R3.label: Regime Turn
R3.detail: Rising COR1M + contango compressing — risk-off ramping

R4.label: Post-Shock
R4.detail: High COR1M + backwardation — shock already happened

presets.name: Total Champion
presets.desc: Most absolute return. thr 9.0, delta -0.20, no filter, 9:45. 71 trades, +$42.3k, MAR 6.9.

presets.name: Champion + VVIX filter
presets.desc: Total Champion but skip days when VVIX_open ≥ 110 (those days bleed). Cleaner risk.

presets.name: Balanced
presets.desc: Sweet spot — high MAR + good return. thr 9.0, delta -0.10. 87 trades, +$35k, MAR 13.1.

presets.name: MAR Champion
presets.desc: Best risk-adjusted (upgraded). thr 9.0, delta -0.075. 110 trades, +$33.6k, MAR 16.1. Walk-forward MAR ~9 both halves.

presets.name: High-WR Champion
presets.desc: Fewer trades, higher hit rate. thr 9.25, delta -0.30. 41 trades, 27% WR, +$42.8k, MAR 10.1.

presets.name: Baseline (article)
presets.desc: Article's literal default. thr 8.25, delta -0.20, no filter. 67 trades, +$37.7k, MAR 5.2.
